act: Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety Act
subject: Appointment of a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety
precis: Appointment of Karen Dawn Adams of Bedford, Nova Scotia, to be a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.
